status: PRIMARY DOI CONFIRMED — DIRECT FULL-TEXT EXTRACTION OPEN

publication.title: Preclinical safety evaluation of body protective compound-157, a potential drug for treating various wounds

permitted_summary: A dedicated preclinical safety publication exists and its DOI is confirmed. It supports the existence of a formal animal toxicology evidence domain.
not_permitted: Claims that a NOAEL or animal safety margin validates a human dose
Claims that grey-market products match the tested material
required_next_action: Obtain full text and extract species, study duration, dose levels, exposure margins, clinical observations, pathology and reported toxicity conclusions.
